title: Mediterranean Melted Cheese Casserole
description: A delicious and easy-to-make casserole that combines the flavors of the Mediterranean with melted cheese.
instructions: Roll out the puff pastry and place it in a baking dish.
Spread the tomato paste over the pastry, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Sprinkle the shredded mozzarella cheese over the tomato paste.
Top with crumbled feta cheese and chopped parsley.
Drizzle with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Fold the edges of the pastry up over the filling to create a crust.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
